Motion To Compel Independent Medical Examination Of Plaintiff And A Request For Sanctions Against Plaintiff And Plaintiff Counsel
Off Calendar Dec-21-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTs DAVID CAMERLO and CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's Motion To Compel Independent Medical Examination Of Plaintiff And A Request For Sanctions Against Plaintiff And Plaintiff Counsel

City and County of San Francisco and David Carmelo's motion to compel "independent medical examination" is GRANTED. No sanctions are awarded; their imposition would be unjust. Counsel for CCSF is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling
